name: SYS 01 — Lead Sourcing Machine
description: Runs every Monday 7AM EST. Finds local businesses via Google Maps Places API using CONFIG queries, fetches details (phone, website), normalizes to leads; for warm/hot finds emails via Hunter.io and creates/updates HubSpot contact; logs to Leads sheet and Automations Log; dedupes by Place ID.

parameters.content:
## SYS 01 — Lead Sourcing Machine

**Trigger:** Every Monday 7AM EST (cron).

**What it does:** Finds local businesses via Google Maps Places API using CONFIG's lead sourcing queries (e.g. "HVAC company NJ"). For each query it fetches places, gets details (phone, website), normalizes to a lead record. **Send to HubSpot?** uses **CONFIG `leadSourcing.minScoreForHubSpot`** (default `0` = every scraped lead after sheet append; set `4` for legacy warm+ only). When sent to HubSpot, optionally finds emails via **Hunter.io** (domain from website), creates/updates the HubSpot contact (phone-only path when no real email — see SW: Create or Update HubSpot Contact), creates or finds the HubSpot company, associates, and creates a deal. Results are logged to the Leads, Contacts, Companies, and Deals sheets, plus the Automations Log.

**Loop Over Leads** processes one lead at a time (batch size 1), so you get one row per lead in the Leads tab and one CRM path per lead that passes the HubSpot score gate. The loop runs back from Log to Sheet to process the next lead until done.

**SYS 02 enrollment:** Only when the contact subworkflow returns **created** (not **updated**); phone-only updates do not re-enroll outreach.

**Dedupe:** Filter New Leads Only skips places whose Place ID is already in the Leads sheet. Ensure the Leads sheet has a **Place ID** column (added automatically on append); existing sheets may need this column added manually for dedupe to work.

**Dependencies:** CONFIG, Create/Update Contact, Create Deal, Log, Google Chat Alert. Requires Google Maps API credential and HubSpot API credential.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { data: { emails: [] } } }];

workflowId.cachedResultName: SW: Create or Update HubSpot Contact

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filterGroups: [{ filters: [{ propertyName: 'name', operator: 'EQ', value: $json.company }] }], limit: 1 }) }}

={{ (() => { const ctx = $('Build CRM Context').first().json; const props = { name: ctx.company, phone: ctx.phone || '', website: ctx.website || '', city: ctx.city || '', state: ctx.state || '' }; if (ctx.hubspotIndustry) props.industry = ctx.hubspotIndustry; return JSON.stringify({ properties: props }); })() }}

nodes.name: Create Deal Only for New Company?
Append Deals Only When Has Deal?

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contactId: $('Build CRM Context').first().json.contactId, company: $('Build CRM Context').first().json.company, industry: $('Build CRM Context').first().json.industry, firstName: $('Build CRM Context').first().json.firstName }) }}

workflowId.cachedResultName: SW: Log to Automations Log Sheet

main.node: Create Deal Only for New Company?
Create Deal Only for New Company?
Append Deals Only When Has Deal?
Append Deals Only When Has Deal?
